requirements.requirement: Automatically add every substantive new request and its remaining work to governed progress and continuity tracking.
Continue safe executable work automatically and carry the same rule into future Jarvis work.
Reconstruct and track all unfinished requirements from previous Jarvis project chats, files and exports.
Create a Business module with separate Jenok and Cost Plus One Auto Parts business namespaces and full frameworks.
Unify applicable shared Jarvis services across both businesses without merging their brands, ledgers, operations or legal responsibilities.
Capture the uploaded Apollo Pattern Engine MillionVerifier framework for Sof Property Scout, expand it, preserve provenance and quarantine unsupported or unsafe claims.
Research, build and prepare deployment of Jenok and Cost Plus One Auto Parts through the digital factory using evidence gates and approvals.
Answer whether all user requests across all Jarvis project chats have been captured with proof.
requirements.blocker: Exact bodies and attachments of every project chat and export are not available in the current source denominator.

requirements.requirement: Automatically discover credible free and open AI repositories, consolidated tool collections, apps, plugins, connectors and related capabilities whenever requests or uploads identify a matching need.
Trace each discovered or integrated capability from the originating user request or upload through repository provenance, connector, tool action, logs, evidence, approval, cost and rollback.
Identify ChatHub uploads by filenames containing ChatHub or Chat Hub and preserve their exact bytes and wording without silently rewriting uploaded frameworks or model responses.
Consolidate six or eight ChatHub multi-LLM responses into one derived answer while retaining every original response word-for-word, model identity, disagreements and source pointers.
Integrate the owner's paid ChatHub membership into applicable Jarvis workflows using the most cost-effective supported route, without assuming that a subscription supplies an unsupported server API.
requirements.blocker: Current export schema and Custom Chatbot staging interoperability require owner-supplied exports and a scoped Jarvis endpoint.

truth_boundary: The ledger captures the current request and accessible durable context. It is not a substitute for ingesting unavailable historical source bodies. Original source text is preserved separately from execution decisions; legal, security, permission and approval controls remain applicable.
